daily_goal_screen.title: Daily XP goal
daily_goal_screen.subtitle: How much do you want to learn each day?
daily_goal_screen.hint: You can change this any time. The goal resets every day at midnight (your device's local time).

about.title: About Rwendo

what_card.title: What is Rwendo?
what_card.body: Rwendo (Shona for "journey") is a language learning app and AI companion. Learn Shona with Rwen — a friendly chameleon powered by Claude AI and ElevenLabs voice — through a 7-phase lesson method based on second language acquisition research.

meet_card.title: Meet Rwen
meet_card.body: Rwen is a chameleon, a creature that adapts to its surroundings. Rwen learns about you and adapts the way it speaks, teaches, and supports you. The more you talk, the better Rwen knows you.

method_card.title: The Rwendo Method
method_card.body: 7 phases per lesson: Hook → Chunks → Pattern → Practice → Dialogue → Recall → Mission. Maximum 3 new chunks per lesson. 5–7 minutes per lesson. Built around 10 SLA pillars including spaced repetition, comprehensible input, and meaningful output.

builders_card.title: Built by
builders_card.body: A solo developer based in Australia who believes language learning should feel like a conversation with a friend, not a chore.

about.footer:
Made with ❤️ for everyone learning Shona
Mhoro!

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.intro: Quick answers to the questions Rwen hears most.

faq.q: How do I talk to Rwen?
faq.a: Tap the Rwen tab in the centre of the bottom bar. You can type a message or hold the mic button to speak. Tap the 🎙 icon in the top right to start a hands-free conversation.

faq.q: Why does Rwen sometimes get things wrong?
faq.a: Rwen is an AI (Claude). AI can make mistakes — including factual errors and odd translations. Treat Rwen as a conversation partner, not a textbook. For anything critical, double-check with a human Shona speaker.
Complete lessons in the Learn tab. Each correct answer earns XP, and finishing a lesson awards a bonus. Your daily XP goal resets every day.
Open the app and complete at least one activity each day to keep your streak alive. Miss a day and the streak resets to 1.
Yes — go to Profile → Rwen's Voice and pick from George, Charlie, Jessica, or Alice. The change applies to text-to-speech immediately.

faq.q: Is my conversation with Rwen private?
faq.a: Your messages are sent to Anthropic (Claude) for processing and stored in Supabase for up to 12 months. Anthropic does NOT use your conversations to train its models. Voice recordings are deleted within 24 hours. See the Privacy Policy for full detail.

faq.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a: Subscriptions are managed through your app store (App Store or Google Play). EU/UK users have a 14-day cooling-off period during which you can cancel for a full refund.

faq.q: How do I delete my account?
faq.a: Profile → Delete Account & All Data. This removes your profile, lesson progress, and conversation history within 30 days. The action cannot be undone.

faq.q: I found a bug — what do I do?
faq.a: Tap "Contact Us" below or email support@rwendo.app. Include your device, app version, and what you were doing when the bug happened.
It's in development. Hands-free voice calls with Rwen will arrive with the Companion subscription tier in an upcoming update.

privacy_screen.title: Privacy settings
privacy_screen.intro: Manage what data Rwendo keeps about you. For the full policy, read the Privacy Policy.

clear.label: Clear conversation history
clear.sub: Delete every message you've sent to Rwen.
clear.confirm_body: This permanently deletes every message you've exchanged with Rwen. Your lesson progress and account stay intact. This cannot be undone.
clear.success_body: Your conversation history has been deleted.

export_row.label: Export my data
export_row.sub: Download a copy of your profile, progress, and conversations.

anthropic.label: Anthropic (Claude)
anthropic.sub: Receives your messages to generate Rwen's replies. Not used for training.

elevenlabs.label: ElevenLabs (voice)
elevenlabs.sub: Generates Rwen's voice and transcribes yours. Audio deleted within 24 hours.

supabase.label: Supabase (database)
supabase.sub: Stores your account, progress, and conversation history.

rights.policy_sub: Full detail of what we collect and why.

privacy_screen.note: To delete your entire account, return to Profile → Delete Account & All Data.

export_screen.title: Export my data
export_screen.hero_body: Generate a JSON copy of your profile, lesson progress, and conversation history with Rwen. You can email it to yourself, save it to Files, or send it anywhere your device supports.

lesson_progress.label: Lesson progress

export_screen.note: Your data is generated on-device from Supabase and only sent where you choose to share it. Nothing is uploaded to a third-party.

notify.body: Travel Mode is in development. Keep learning your Shona — by the time you land in Harare, Rwen will be ready to guide you.
notify.email_body: Hi Rwen, please let me know when Travel Mode launches!
notify.fallback_body: Email hello@rwendo.app and we'll add you to the early-access list.

spotlight.label: DESTINATION SPOTLIGHT
spotlight.title: 🌊 Victoria Falls
spotlight.desc: One of the Seven Natural Wonders of the World, on the Zambezi River between Zimbabwe and Zambia. In Shona culture, it is a sacred place — the home of the water spirits, midzimu yemvura.

tips: Every great journey begins with 'Mhoro'. You've already taken the first step.
In Shona, 'Ukama igasva hunozadziswa nekudya' — relationships are completed by sharing food. Share what you learn today.
The prefix Ma- for elders, Wa- for friends. One letter, a world of respect.
Sadza is more than food — it's identity. When you eat sadza, you eat Zimbabwe.
Chara chimwe hachitswanyi inda — one finger cannot kill a louse. Keep building, word by word.
Rwen tip: practice your last lesson out loud today. Speaking is 10× more effective than reading.
Makadii? — three syllables that open every door in Zimbabwe.
You're learning a language spoken by millions. Every word you master is a connection made.
